audit_status.review_note: Reviewed as Esau/Edom genealogy with focus on names, Seir, chiefs, kings before Israelite monarchy, and Edom identity. Genealogical chapter kept lean by design.

verses.restored: These are the generations of Esau, that is, Edom.

familiar.text: Now these are the generations of Esau, who is Edom.

notes.title: Esau/Edom
notes.body: The chapter explicitly identifies Esau with Edom and develops the Edomite line.

verses.restored: Esau took his women from the daughters of Canaan: Adah daughter of Elon the Hittite, Oholibamah daughter of Anah, daughter of Zibeon the Hivite,

familiar.text: Esau took his wives of the daughters of Canaan...

verses.restored: and Basemath, Ishmael’s daughter, sister of Nebaioth.

familiar.text: And Bashemath Ishmael's daughter, sister of Nebajoth.

verses.restored: Adah bore Eliphaz to Esau, and Basemath bore Reuel.

familiar.text: And Adah bare to Esau Eliphaz; and Bashemath bare Reuel;

verses.restored: Oholibamah bore Jeush, Jalam, and Korah. These are the sons of Esau who were born to him in the land of Canaan.

familiar.text: And Aholibamah bare Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah...

verses.restored: Esau took his women, his sons, his daughters, and all the persons of his house, his livestock, all his animals, and all his possessions that he had gathered in the land of Canaan, and went to a land away from Jacob his brother.

familiar.text: And Esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters...

verses.restored: For their possessions were too many for them to dwell together, and the land of their sojournings could not bear them because of their livestock.

familiar.text: For their riches were more than that they might dwell together...

notes.title: Separation by abundance
notes.body: The separation echoes Abram and Lot: wealth creates spatial pressure.

verses.restored: Esau dwelled in the hill country of Seir. Esau is Edom.

familiar.text: Thus dwelt Esau in mount Seir: Esau is Edom.

verses.restored: These are the generations of Esau, father of Edom, in the hill country of Seir.

familiar.text: And these are the generations of Esau the father of the Edomites...

verses.restored: These are the names of Esau’s sons: Eliphaz son of Adah, Esau’s woman, and Reuel son of Basemath, Esau’s woman.

familiar.text: These are the names of Esau's sons; Eliphaz...

verses.restored: The sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam, and Kenaz.

familiar.text: And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho...

verses.restored: Timna was concubine to Eliphaz, Esau’s son, and she bore Amalek to Eliphaz. These were the sons of Adah, Esau’s woman.

familiar.text: And Timna was concubine to Eliphaz Esau's son...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah. These were the sons of Basemath, Esau’s woman.

familiar.text: And these are the sons of Reuel; Nahath, and Zerah...

verses.restored: These were the sons of Oholibamah, daughter of Anah, daughter of Zibeon, Esau’s woman: she bore to Esau Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.

familiar.text: And these were the sons of Aholibamah...

verses.restored: These are the chiefs of the sons of Esau: the sons of Eliphaz, firstborn of Esau: chief Teman, chief Omar, chief Zepho, chief Kenaz,

familiar.text: These were dukes of the sons of Esau...

notes.title: Chiefs
notes.body: Alluf means clan chief or leader, traditionally rendered duke in older English.

verses.restored: chief Korah, chief Gatam, chief Amalek. These are the chiefs descended from Eliphaz in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Adah.

familiar.text: Duke Korah, duke Gatam, and duke Amalek...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Reuel, Esau’s son: chief Nahath, chief Zerah, chief Shammah, chief Mizzah. These are the chiefs descended from Reuel in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Basemath, Esau’s woman.

familiar.text: And these are the sons of Reuel Esau's son...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Oholibamah, Esau’s woman: chief Jeush, chief Jalam, chief Korah. These are the chiefs descended from Oholibamah daughter of Anah, Esau’s woman.

familiar.text: And these are the sons of Aholibamah Esau's wife...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Esau, that is, Edom, and these are their chiefs.

familiar.text: These are the sons of Esau, who is Edom, and these are their dukes.

verses.restored: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, inhabitants of the land: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,

familiar.text: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, who inhabited the land...

verses.restored: Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan. These are the chiefs of the Horites, sons of Seir, in the land of Edom.

familiar.text: And Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan: these are the dukes of the Horites...

verses.restored: The sons of Lotan were Hori and Heman, and Lotan’s sister was Timna.

familiar.text: And the children of Lotan were Hori and Hemam...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Shobal: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.

familiar.text: And the children of Shobal were these; Alvan...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah. This is Anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness as he pastured the donkeys of Zibeon his father.

familiar.text: And these are the children of Zibeon; both Ajah, and Anah...

notes.title: Hot springs
notes.body: Yemim is difficult; hot springs is a common rendering, though other interpretations exist.

verses.restored: These are the children of Anah: Dishon and Oholibamah daughter of Anah.

familiar.text: And the children of Anah were these; Dishon, and Aholibamah...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Dishon: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.

familiar.text: And these are the children of Dishon; Hemdan...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Akan.

familiar.text: The children of Ezer are these; Bilhan...

verses.restored: These are the sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

familiar.text: The children of Dishan are these; Uz, and Aran.

verses.restored: These are the chiefs of the Horites: chief Lotan, chief Shobal, chief Zibeon, chief Anah,

familiar.text: These are the dukes that came of the Horites...

verses.restored: chief Dishon, chief Ezer, chief Dishan. These are the chiefs of the Horites, according to their chiefs in the land of Seir.

familiar.text: Duke Dishon, duke Ezer, duke Dishan...

verses.restored: These are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the sons of Israel.

familiar.text: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom...

notes.title: Before Israel's kings
notes.body: The narrator contrasts Edomite kingship with later Israelite monarchy.

verses.restored: Bela son of Beor reigned in Edom, and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

familiar.text: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom...

verses.restored: Bela died, and Jobab son of Zerah from Bozrah reigned in his place.

familiar.text: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned...

verses.restored: Jobab died, and Husham from the land of the Temanites reigned in his place.

familiar.text: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of Temani reigned...

verses.restored: Husham died, and Hadad son of Bedad, who struck Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his place; the name of his city was Avith.

familiar.text: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad...

verses.restored: Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his place.

familiar.text: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned...

verses.restored: Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth on the River reigned in his place.

familiar.text: And Samlah died, and Saul of Rehoboth by the river reigned...

verses.restored: Shaul died, and Baal-hanan son of Achbor reigned in his place.

familiar.text: And Saul died, and Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned...

verses.restored: Baal-hanan son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his place. The name of his city was Pau, and the name of his woman was Mehetabel daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.

familiar.text: And Baalhanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned...

verses.restored: These are the names of the chiefs of Esau, according to their families, according to their places, by their names: chief Timna, chief Alvah, chief Jetheth,

familiar.text: And these are the names of the dukes that came of Esau...

verses.restored: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon,

familiar.text: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,

verses.restored: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar,

familiar.text: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,

verses.restored: chief Magdiel, chief Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom according to their dwellings in the land of their possession. This is Esau, father of Edom.

familiar.text: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram: these be the dukes of Edom...

notes.title: Father of Edom
notes.body: The chapter closes as it began: Esau is father of Edom.
